summary: Iteration 48: Implant Indications Feature Testing - 20/20 tests PASSED (100%). All implant indication features verified working correctly.

frontend_issues.note: Frontend testing skipped per request (React Native/Expo app, not web frontend)

critical_code_review_comments: Feature 1 (GET /api/implant-library/systems): PASS - Returns 49 systems with indication, indicated_procedures, indicated_bone_types fields for 38 systems
Feature 2 (POST /api/implant-library/suggest-auto with Immediate Implant): PASS - Returns procedure-matched systems first (procedure_match: true)
Feature 3 (POST /api/implant-library/suggest-auto with Conventional Implant): PASS - Matches conventional-indicated systems correctly
Feature 4 (restricted_teeth field): PASS - Nobel Biocare NobelActive NP and Osstem MS have correct restricted_teeth arrays
Feature 5 (indicated_teeth field): PASS - BioHorizons Tapered Pro and Conelog Progressive Line have correct indicated_teeth arrays
Feature 6 (Brand name correction): PASS - Brand name is 'Nobel Biocare' (not 'Noble Biocare')
Feature 7 (Bone type filtering): PASS - D3/D4-only systems (Drive GM Acqua, TS IV, SS III) do not appear for D1 bone type
Feature 8 (GET /api/procedures): PASS - Returns data for search functionality

success_rate.frontend: N/A (skipped per request - React Native app)

seed_data_creation: No test data created - read-only tests on existing implant library
context_for_next_testing_agent: Implant indication features verified working. Key findings: 49 systems total, 38 have indications. IMPLANT_INDICATIONS dict in server.py (line 3414) contains all indication data. SUGGEST_ME_TO_CASE_PROCEDURES mapping (line 3619) maps frontend procedure names to backend procedure types. Bone type filtering and procedure matching both work correctly in suggest-auto endpoint.

tested_features.indication_fields_present: PASS - All systems with indications have indication, indicated_procedures, indicated_bone_types
tested_features.conventional_implant_procedure_match: PASS - Matches systems with Single/Multiple Conventional Implant
tested_features.clinical_guidance_response: PASS - Returns bone_width, bone_height, bone_type, diameter/length ranges
tested_features.validation_missing_fields: PASS - Returns 400 for empty procedures or invalid bone_width
tested_features.procedures_endpoint: PASS - Returns list of procedures for search

tested_endpoints.POST /api/implant-library/suggest-auto: 200 - Procedure matching and bone type filtering working
